title: rudbeckia serotina f. pulcherrima
intro: Rudbeckia serotina f. pulcherrima, also known as the tall coneflower, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The tall coneflower has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
